ddls:
CREATE TABLE "call_types" (
  "call_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each call type */,
  "call_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the call type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the call type */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the call type is handled */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department responsible for the call type */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Priority level of the call type */,
  "average_duration" TEXT /* Average duration of calls for this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_call_types_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_call_types_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "call_records" (
  "call_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each call */,
  "call_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the call type */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who handled the call */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the call */,
  "service_level" INTEGER /* Whether the call met the service level */,
  "aban_within_sl" INTEGER /* Whether the call was abandoned within the service level */,
  "asa" TEXT /* Average speed of answer */,
  "offered" INTEGER /* Number of calls offered */,
  "assigned_from_q" INTEGER /* Number of calls assigned from the queue */,
  "answered" INTEGER /* Number of calls answered */,
  "awt" TEXT /* Average wait time */,
  "handled" INTEGER /* Number of calls handled */,
  "aban" INTEGER /* Number of calls abandoned */,
  "flow_out" INTEGER /* Number of calls that flowed out */,
  "handle_time" TEXT /* Average handle time */,
  "calls_error" INTEGER /* Number of calls that resulted in errors */,
  "talk_time" TEXT /* Average talk time */,
  "customer_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the customer */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Resolution status of the call */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_call_records_call_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("call_type_id") REFERENCES call_types ("call_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_call_records_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the agent belongs to */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the agent operates */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the agent */,
  "shift_start" TEXT /* Start time of the agent's shift */,
  "shift_end" TEXT /* End time of the agent's shift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent */,
  "call_id" INTEGER /* ID of the call */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the performance record */,
  "calls_handled" INTEGER /* Number of calls handled by the agent */,
  "average_handle_time" TEXT /* Average handle time for the calls handled */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors made by the agent */,
  "customer_satisfaction_score" INTEGER /* Customer satisfaction score provided by customers */,
  "escalation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the agent escalated a call */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_performance_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_performance_call_id FOREIGN KEY ("call_id") REFERENCES call_records ("call_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "number_of_centers" INTEGER /* Number of call centers in the region */,
  "local_language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Annual budget of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "call_errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error record */,
  "call_id" INTEGER /* ID of the call */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of error */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the error */,
  "resolution_action" TEXT /* Action taken to resolve the error */,
  "error_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_call_errors_call_id FOREIGN KEY ("call_id") REFERENCES call_records ("call_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., call center manager, analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., call record, report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
